mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_CARD_SURVEY_ANSWERS.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO CARD_SURVEY_ANSWERS ( answer_id, survey_id, question_code, answer_value ) VALUES ( #{answerId}, #{surveyId}, #{questionCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.StringTypeHandler}, #{answerValue, jdbcType=VARCHAR, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.StringTypeHandler} )

SELECT SEQ_CARD_SURVEY_COMMENTS.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO CARD_SURVEY_COMMENTS ( comment_id, survey_id, user_id, comment_text, created_at ) VALUES ( #{commentId}, #{surveyId}, #{userId}, #{commentText, jdbcType=VARCHAR, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.StringTypeHandler}, SYSTIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul' )
mapper.select: SELECT survey_id AS surveyId, user_id AS userId, submitted_at AS submittedAt, reward_given_yn AS rewardGivenYn FROM CARD_SURVEYS WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY submitted_at DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY

SELECT comment_id AS commentId, survey_id AS surveyId, user_id AS userId, comment_text AS commentText, created_at AS createdAt FROM CARD_SURVEY_COMMENTS WHERE sentiment IS NULL AND comment_text IS NOT NULL ORDER BY created_at ASC FETCH FIRST 50 ROWS ONLY
mapper.update: UPDATE CARD_SURVEY_COMMENTS SET sentiment = #{sentiment, jdbcType=VARCHAR, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.StringTypeHandler}, sentiment_score = #{sentimentScore, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, analyzed_at = SYSTIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul' WHERE comment_id = #{commentId}
